---
title: "Hardware"
---

::: {.page-lead}
The instruments behind the experiments: custom rigs, chambers, and illumination I design and
build to deliver light and capture behavior.
:::

[Behavioral rigs]{.eyebrow}

::::: {.card-grid}

:::: {.pcard}
<img class="pcard-media" src="hardware/celegans/worm-chamber-stereo-04.png" alt="C. elegans tracking rig">

::: {.pcard-body}
### [*C. elegans* behavioral tracking](hardware/celegans/index.qmd){.stretched-link}
[Optogenetics · custom rig · DeepLabCut]{.paper-meta}
:::

::::

:::: {.pcard}
<img class="pcard-media" src="hardware/climbing/green-led.png" alt="Green-lit climbing assay rig inside the incubator">

::: {.pcard-body}
### [Climbing chamber](hardware/climbing/index.qmd){.stretched-link}
[Vertical assay · negative geotaxis]{.paper-meta}
:::

::::

:::::
